audit_items.proof_trace: The bid() function enforces both flows atomically: safeTransfer(msg.sender, amount) at L444 sends asset out, and safeTransferFrom(msg.sender, address(this), assetOutAmount) at L453 pulls assetOut in. If the pull reverts, the entire transaction reverts (including the send), guaranteeing both flows occur or neither does. The optional flash-swap callback (L449) fires between the two transfers but cannot manipulate assetOutAmount (a pre-computed local stack variable) or call bid() again (blocked by s_entered), and all other token-transferring functions are role-gated beyond attacker reach.
